name: AuEmoChat: Authentic Emotion Understanding and Rendering for Conversational Speech Synthesis

description: arXiv:2607.15755v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Conversational Speech Synthesis (CSS) aims to synthesize speech with human-like emotional expression and contextual consistency in user-agent interactions. Existing CSS methods struggle to render authentic human emotions due to limited predefined emotion label spaces (e.g., seven emotion categories), while redundant multimodal tokens in multi-tu...
author: Zhenqi Jia, Yuan Zhao,  Aruukhan, Rui Liu, Haizhou Li
